items.title: May 24, 1994: New York's Patrick Ewing dunks on Antonio Davis of Indiana during Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 24, 1994: New York's Patrick Ewing dunks on Antonio Davis of Indiana during Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Finals.

Ewing finished with 28 PTS/11 REB/6 BLK and Charles Oakley had 20 PTS/13 REB in the Knicks' 100-89 win. Rik Smits had 27 PTS/10 REB for the Pacers.

items.title: [Robinson] Wizards are team who could quietly position themselves as a compelling wildcard in the sweepstakes for LeBron James... items.body_excerpt: ​ While most of the mainstream media’s attention remains fixed on traditional destinations, the Washington Wizards are team who could quietly position themselves as a compelling wildcard in the sweepstakes for LeBron James. The gravity of Washington’s pitch could center around…
